content:
- Continued task 23 from TO BE VERIFIED, ran deep skeptical verification across 16+ parallel checks, and upgraded plan to Draft 2 with a mandatory delta (kept API structs internal and used CLI-local DTOs).
- Executed NOW EXECUTE: added new CLI binary `pgtuskmasterctl` plus `src/cli/{args,client,error,output,mod}.rs`; wired `pub mod cli`; added parsing/client/output/error tests and binary smoke tests; documented usage in `RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md`.
- Hit two regressions during validation and fixed both: (1) rustls provider panics in existing TLS tests after reqwest/rustls feature resolution, fixed by installing ring provider in TLS test helper; (2) `CARGO_BIN_EXE_*` missing under `cargo test --all-targets`, fixed with fallback binary path derivation in CLI integration test.
- Final required gates all passed after fixes: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task metadata/checklist to done + passing true, wrote AGENTS learning bullets, and ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next immediate step before quitting this context: commit all workspace changes (including .ralph artifacts) with the required `task finished ...` message.

- Started Choose-Task turn by reading prior progress log and .ralph/current_tasks.md.
- Applied mandatory selection rules: bug-first found unfinished bug `.ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-test-bdd-full-suite-hangs.md` with `<passes>false</passes>`, so it must be selected before meta-task or any non-bug tasks.
- Wrote `.ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-test-bdd-full-suite-hangs.md` to `.ralph/current_task.txt` and stopped immediately per instructions.

- Picked active task from .ralph/current_task.txt: .ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-test-bdd-full-suite-hangs.md and did a deep research-only pass (no implementation yet).
- Ran broad parallel exploration across Makefile, HA e2e fixture, etcd harness, test inventory, and historical evidence logs to verify whether the reported full-suite hang is deterministic.
- Reproduced the exact heartbeat symptom line (`...has been running for over 60 seconds`) and confirmed isolated target test currently passes in ~98s, so this appears intermittent/outdated rather than always-deadlocked.
- Identified likely unbounded operations in src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs (initdb/pg_ctl command waits + HTTP read path) that can make rare stalls appear as suite hangs.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into .ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-test-bdd-full-suite-hangs.md and appended required lifecycle marker `TO BE VERIFIED`.
- Did not execute code changes or gate runs in this turn because workflow requires stopping immediately after writing the plan marker.
- Next step on resume: perform deep skeptical verification (16+ parallel tracks), alter at least one plan item, switch marker to NOW EXECUTE, then implement and run make check/test/test-bdd/lint.
